hooks.command: node -e "const {existsSync,readFileSync}=require('fs'),{join}=require('path');const f=join(process.cwd(),'.pi-orchestrator','checkpoint.json');if(existsSync(f)){try{const e=JSON.parse(readFileSync(f,'utf8'));const s=e.state;if(s&&s.phase&&s.phase!=='idle'&&s.phase!=='complete'){const goal=s.selectedGoal?(' goal="'+s.selectedGoal+'"'):'';console.log('\u26a0\ufe0f  Previous orchestration session detected: phase='+s.phase+goal+'. Run /claude-orchestrator:orchestrate to resume or /claude-orchestrator:orchestrate-stop to reset.');}}catch(err){}}" 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'Bead approval processed. Run /claude-orchestrator:orchestrate-status to check progress.'
